title: EvidenceBundle
description: Resolved, policy-safe support package for a claim, feature, story, export preview, Focus answer, or drawer payload. Packages support; does not publish by itself.

evidence_bundle_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this evidence bundle.

candidate_id.description: The candidate this bundle resolves support for.

decision.description: cite when evidence resolves, abstain when missing or unresolvable, deny when policy forbids.

status.description: resolved when bundle is ready to cite, unresolved when evidence is missing or invalid.

spec_hash.description: Spec hash from the proof pack for integrity verification.

proof_pack_ref.description: Reference to the proof pack that backs this bundle.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for abstain or deny decisions.

error_code.description: Machine-readable error code for abstain or deny decisions.

claim_text.description: Human-readable claim text for abstain bundles.
